docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY URBAN, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW URBAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS OMAR SHAFIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH SOBOCAN IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON ALLOWED THE COURT TO CALL (VIA TELEPHONE SPEAKER PHONE) MR. DAVID J. FORAN, ESQ. TO CLARIFY EVIDENCE CREATED BY MR. FORAN, ESQ. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URBAN, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH $1,947.68 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,022.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF URBAN, MATTHEW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-03-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF URBAN, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $38.24 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,141.47 AS TO DEFENDANT SOBOCAN, JOSEPH
